nasb.text: Because the ground is cracked, For there has been no rain on the land; The farmers have been put to shame, They have covered their heads.

esv.text: Because of the ground that is dismayed, since there is no rain on the land, the farmers are ashamed; they cover their heads.

cnv.text: 土地乾裂， 因為地上沒有雨水； 農夫失望， 都蒙著自己的頭。

ccb.text: 天不下雨， 土地干裂， 农夫沮丧地抱着头。
